summary: Comprehensive testing of Lead → Customer → Inspection flow. Backend: 32/32 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages loading correctly - Leads, Customers, Inspections. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in customer creation endpoint.

fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not excluded from response causing 500 error
fixed.fix: Added customer_dict.pop('_id', None) before returning response

seed_data_creation: Created test leads and customers with TEST_ prefix for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead → Customer → Inspection flow tested comprehensively. Backend APIs all working. Frontend pages (Leads, Customers, Inspections) all loading correctly. Payment link modal working - shows multi-step flow for sending payment links. Customer details modal shows Overview, Packages, Notes tabs. Inspections page shows Scheduled/Unscheduled tabs. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in POST /api/customers endpoint.

frontend_tests: Leads page - PASSED (144 leads, filters working)
Payment link modal - PASSED (multi-step flow working)
Customers page - PASSED (30 customers, filters working)
Customer details modal - PASSED (Overview, Packages, Notes tabs)

flow_verification.lead_creation: Working - leads can be created with various fields
flow_verification.lead_filtering: Working - by city, status, date range
flow_verification.payment_link_modal: Working - multi-step flow for sending payment links
flow_verification.customer_creation: Working - customers can be created directly
